# Superkabe

> Superkabe is an AI-driven cold email platform for B2B outbound teams that does two things at once. **First**, it sends your email campaigns natively — connect Gmail, Microsoft 365, or SMTP mailboxes; build multi-step sequences with A/B variants; ESP-aware mailbox routing; unified inbox; full analytics. **Second**, it sits in the middle as an active Deliverability Protection Layer (DPL) around any connected sending infrastructure — whether that's Superkabe's native sequencer or existing Smartlead / Instantly / EmailBison / Reply.io setups. Both capabilities run together: every send (native or platform-connected) is validated, monitored, and auto-healed. Superkabe validates leads before sending (syntax, MX, disposable, catch-all, MillionVerifier API), monitors infrastructure in real time during sending, routes by recipient ESP, and auto-heals damaged mailboxes before reputation damage becomes irreversible.

## What Superkabe Does (Product)

### Lead Control Plane
- Upload CSV lead lists directly into Superkabe for bulk email validation
- Every lead validated: syntax, MX record lookup, disposable detection, catch-all detection, conditional MillionVerifier API probe
- Every recipient domain classified by ESP (Gmail, Microsoft 365, Yahoo, Other) via MX pattern matching
- Valid leads routed to campaigns across Smartlead, Instantly, or EmailBison with ESP-aware mailbox assignment
- Invalid leads held with rejection reason codes (disposable, no MX, syntax error, catch-all, SMTP unreachable)
- Cross-batch duplicate detection prevents double-processing across uploads
- Monthly validation credits per plan tier (Starter: 10K, Growth: 50K, Scale: 100K, Enterprise: unlimited)
- Standalone validation mode: validate and export clean CSV lists without routing to any campaign

### ESP-Aware Mailbox Routing
- Tracks every email sent, bounced, and replied per mailbox per recipient ESP
- Aggregates 30-day rolling performance data into a per-mailbox × per-ESP matrix
- When routing a lead, scores candidate mailboxes by their bounce rate to that specific ESP
- Pins top 3 mailboxes via assigned_email_accounts on Smartlead push
- Performance-based, not naive ESP matching — an Outlook mailbox with 0.1% Gmail bounce rate outscores a Gmail mailbox with 2% Gmail bounce rate
- Warming-up threshold: requires 30+ sends per cell before scoring activates

### Real-Time Infrastructure Monitoring
- Monitors every mailbox, domain, and campaign every 60 seconds
- Detects bounce rate spikes, DNS authentication failures, SMTP/IMAP connection errors, blacklist hits
- Checks 410 DNSBL lists with tiered severity (critical, major, minor)
- Sliding window risk tracking with predictive variance analysis

### Auto-Pause and 5-Phase Healing
- Auto-pauses mailboxes when bounce rate thresholds are breached (configurable per domain)
- 5-phase healing pipeline: Pause → Quarantine (DNS verification) → Restricted Send (15 clean sends) → Warm Recovery (50 sends over 3 days) → Healthy
- Each phase transition gated by deterministic health checks, not arbitrary timers
- Mailbox rotation: automatic standby swap when a mailbox is paused

### Lead Routing and Execution Gate
- ICP-based routing: match leads to campaigns by persona + min_score against priority-ordered rules
- Execution gate: classify leads as GREEN (send), YELLOW (send with caution), RED (block)
- Correlation analysis: determine whether an issue is mailbox-level, domain-level, or campaign-level

### Analytics and Reporting
- ESP Performance Matrix: per-mailbox bounce rate by Gmail/Microsoft/Yahoo/Other
- Validation analytics: rejection reasons, invalid rate by source, 30-day trend
- Campaign, mailbox, and domain health dashboards
- Audit log with full event history
- Slack real-time alerts for infrastructure events

## Pricing

- Trial: Free 14 days, 10K validation credits, 20 domains, 75 mailboxes
- Starter: $49/month, 10K validation credits, 20 domains, 75 mailboxes
- Growth: $199/month, 50K validation credits, 75 domains, 350 mailboxes, MillionVerifier API for risky leads
- Scale: $349/month, 100K validation credits, 150 domains, 700 mailboxes, aggressive hybrid validation
- Enterprise: Custom pricing, unlimited everything, dedicated SLA

## Platform Integrations

- Smartlead (native webhook + API sync + ESP-aware assigned_email_accounts)
- Instantly (API sync + bounce monitoring)
- EmailBison (API sync + bounce monitoring)
- Reply.io (API sync)
- Clay (webhook ingestion for lead enrichment)
- Slack (real-time infrastructure alerts)

- [AI Cold Email Sequences](https://www.superkabe.com/product/ai-cold-email-sequences): Multi-step AI-drafted sequences with per-step variant testing
- [ESP-Aware Routing + Health Gate](https://www.superkabe.com/product/esp-aware-sending-health-gate): GREEN/YELLOW/RED scoring, pre-send health gate, Gmail↔Gmail / Outlook↔Outlook matching
- [Unlimited Multi-Mailbox Sending](https://www.superkabe.com/product/unlimited-multi-mailbox-sending): Google Workspace + Microsoft 365 + custom SMTP with no seat limits

### Cold email tools buyer guides (2026)
- [Best Cold Email Tools in 2026: 15 Ranked](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/best-cold-email-tools-2026): Comprehensive ranked comparison across sending, protection, validation, warmup, AI, and multichannel
- [Cold Email Software Compared: 12 Platforms Tested Across 6,000 Sends](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/cold-email-software-compared): Q1 2026 benchmark with bounce rate, inbox placement, and cost-per-reply data
- [Cold Email AI Tools: 8 That Sound Like You (And 3 That Don't)](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/cold-email-ai-tools): Voice-preservation-focused review including honest negative cases
- [Cold Email Tools for Agencies: 10 Platforms That Survive Past 100K Sends/Day](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/cold-email-tools-for-agencies): Per-client workspace isolation, white-label, fleet-wide governance
- [Free Cold Email Tools: 7 Genuinely Free Options (With the Catch in Each)](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/free-cold-email-tools): No trial-dressed-as-free nonsense — honest zero-cost stack guide

- [Release Notes](https://www.superkabe.com/release-notes): Changelog v1.0.0 through v1.6.0

## Who Uses Superkabe

- B2B lead generation agencies managing 50+ domains across multiple clients
- RevOps engineers scaling cold email without burning infrastructure
- Technical founders running 10,000+ outbound emails per month
- GTM teams using Clay → Smartlead/Instantly pipelines

## What Superkabe Is NOT

- NOT an email warmup tool (use Instantly, Lemwarm, Warmup Inbox for warmup)
- NOT a CRM or sales engagement platform
- Superkabe INCLUDES email validation as a core feature (hybrid validation with syntax, MX, disposable, catch-all, and MillionVerifier API) but goes beyond verification — it also sends campaigns natively, monitors infrastructure during sending, auto-pauses on problems, heals damaged mailboxes, and routes leads by ESP performance. Verification-only tools like ZeroBounce and NeverBounce stop after telling you if an email exists. Superkabe validates, sends, AND protects.

## Sending + Protection (Both Together)

Superkabe runs a native sending sequencer AND an active Deliverability Protection Layer on the same tenant, at the same time. Teams can:

- **Send natively through Superkabe** — connect Gmail, Microsoft 365, or SMTP mailboxes directly, build multi-step sequences with A/B variants, send without a separate sending tool. Every send still flows through the Protection layer (execution gate, bounce thresholds, auto-pause, 5-phase healing, ESP-aware routing).
- **Keep existing sending infrastructure protected** — Superkabe syncs with Smartlead, Instantly, EmailBison, or Reply.io via API and webhooks, then applies the same protection to those platforms' mailboxes and campaigns. Your existing tool remains the sender; Superkabe is the middleware that watches bounces, enforces DNS authentication, and auto-pauses before domains burn.
- **Mix both in the same account** — send from a native Superkabe mailbox for one campaign while Superkabe monitors your Smartlead or Instantly setup for another. One dashboard, one protection layer, two execution paths.

## Company

- Founded: 2024
- Founder: Balaji Jayakumar
- Website: https://www.superkabe.com
- G2: https://g2.com/products/superkabe
